'''Slabba Drewl''' was a [[Chef/Legends|chef]] captured by [[Corpo (Hutt)|Corpo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He was later rescued by [[Micah Giiett]] and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]. He was very short and had a blunt head with blue skin. He had small beady eyes and a large mouth.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The name "Slabba Drewl" is a play on the words "slobber" and "drool".

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|7|Jedi Chef}} {{1st}}
